title: Ocugen Stock Analysis and News on MarketBeat
text: MarketBeat stock analysis of Ocugen Inc. Company information: Nasdaq-listed biopharmaceutical company focused on gene therapy development. Market cap approximately $350M. 52-week range: $1.20 - $6.50. Current trading patterns reflect clinical milestone-driven volatility. Recent stock moves: Positive moves following clinical data announcements. Declines on going concern warnings and financing dilutions. News feed highlights: Frequent updates on clinical trial progress. Regulatory approvals and FDA alignments. Financing announcements. Executive appointments. Key metrics: Price-to-Sales ratio unavailable due to minimal revenue. Enterprise Value to Revenue multiple reflects development stage status. Float shares increased significantly due to recent convertible offerings.
